form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, 10th of 14 at Ascot 2yo Swp on February 21 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Morning Thunder with 57kg at $21. Second-up 6th of 10 at Bunbury 2yo Swp on March 7 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Here The Boom carrying 57kg at $14. Improver who can get into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Lining up for just third start. At debut, 10th of 14 at Ascot 2yo Swp on February 21 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Morning Thunder with 57kg at $21. Second-up 6th of 10 at Bunbury 2yo Swp on March 7 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Here The Boom carrying 57kg at $14. Improver who can get into the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide for the majority. Bumped with another runner near the 100m.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months second last of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 7 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 57kg at $41. Previously second-up got back early 6th of 9 at Ascot 2yo Swp on October 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind All On Red with 56kg at $19. Blinkers on so may go better.

form.formComment: Was at a huge quote at debut, 6th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Dixie Doo with 57kg at $71. Can do better. Should get closer.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Was at a huge quote at debut, 6th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Dixie Doo with 57kg at $71. Can do better. Should get closer.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Gelding by Splintex on debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on March 30 over 1000m. Trialled well and keep an eye on the betting.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Splintex on debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on March 30 over 1000m. Trialled well and keep an eye on the betting.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 10th of 12 at Ascot Crystal Slipper on November 22 over 1100m, 8 len behind Beatty carrying 55kg at $19. Went for a break before returning set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, nose behind Dixie Doo carrying 55kg at $10. The speedy filly can go one better.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up approaching the 200m and taken inwards to continue into clear running.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 6th of 11 at Ascot 2yo Swp on March 14 over 1100m, 7 len behind Jedi Dream carrying 55kg at $16. Last start 3rd of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Dixie Doo with 55kg at $15. Promising type who gets her chance.
